_standalone_items.label: Image
_standalone_items.text_prompt: A full-body fashion photograph of a Black male model with textured curly hair, standing in a minimalist light-grey studio. He wears a cream-colored worker jacket over a brown knit sweater and a white shirt. A long, textured grey-taupe scarf is draped around his neck. Brown corduroy patch-pocket trousers, a black belt, and dark brown leather penny loafers. Soft studio lighting.

_manual_items.label: Image
_manual_items.text_prompt: A full-body fashion photograph of a Black male model with textured curly hair, standing in a minimalist light-grey studio. He wears a cream-colored worker jacket over a brown knit sweater and a white shirt. A long, textured grey-taupe scarf is draped around his neck. Brown corduroy patch-pocket trousers, a black belt, and dark brown leather penny loafers. Soft studio lighting.

_batch_creators.user_comment: Generate a batch of 12 lifestyle campaign images for Zara's Faux Suede Overshirt, showcasing a diverse range of models (mixed genders, ethnicities, ages 25-40) wearing it styled casually in everyday aspects of life: urban street commute, cozy coffee shop chat, modern office meeting, park jog recovery, weekend market browse, evening dinner date, airport travel hustle, rooftop party vibe, home office setup, beachside walk, gym locker room, and nightlife bar hop. Employ a vibrant, cinematic visual style with natural daylight or soft golden hour lighting, warm neutral palette emphasizing the jacket's rich faux suede texture and sheen, dynamic compositions from low-angle hero shots to candid eye-level candids. Vary poses from confident strides and relaxed leans to interactive gestures, layer with trendy basics like tees, jeans, chinos or dresses, add minimal accessories, and shift moods from energetic urban to serene casual for versatile appeal.

items.prompt: 2:3. Black male model with textured curly hair, 30-year-old lean athletic build, wearing A men's hip-length shirt jacket, or overshirt, in a solid cream ivory color with a subtle warm undertone, crafted from a structured, heavyweight fabric with a matte, sueded texture that absorbs light. The garment features a straight, boxy silhouette with a classic pointed spread collar. The front closure consists of a clean-finished placket with five large, round, flat, solid matte black four-hole buttons providing a stark contrast. On the chest, there are two large, symmetrically placed rectangular patch pockets, each with a straight, unfastened top flap. Additional pockets include two vertical welt pockets seamlessly integrated into the side seams, positioned just above the hemline. The long sleeves are straight-cut and terminate in simple, unbuttoned cuffs. All seams, including the collar edges, placket, pocket perimeters, flaps, and the straight bottom hem, are defined by precise, clean, single-needle topstitching in a matching cream ivory thread, layered over a fitted white graphic t-shirt, slim-fit dark blue jeans, and white leather sneakers, minimal silver watch. Confidently striding forward during urban street commute in bustling city sidewalk with blurred pedestrians and taxis in background. Natural morning daylight with soft shadows highlighting the jacket's sueded texture, warm neutral palette. Low-angle hero shot, ARRI Alexa Mini, 24mm wide lens, shallow depth of field, dynamic composition. Natural skin texture with visible pores, subtle grain, fine peach fuzz, not airbrushed. Vibrant cinematic mood, energetic urban vibe. Photorealistic, high detail, skin texture. Using input image 1 for face and identity reference. Keep the facial features, face shape, skin tone, and hair exactly consistent with the uploaded image. Using input image 2 for product identity. Preserve product appearance exactly as in reference. No geometric distortion, no extra fingers, no airbrushed skin, no watermarks.
